channel.title: Game-Design on Himalaya's Dev Journal
channel.description: Recent content in Game-Design on Himalaya's Dev Journal

item.title: PixelQuest — A Retro Platformer
item.description: A canvas-based platformer built from scratch with JavaScript. Features procedural level generation and pixel art assets.

item.title: My 2026 Reading List: Game Dev Books
item.description: Books that shaped my understanding of game architecture, design, and production.
